prompt: For the self-hosted-application-platform capability, draft an ADR for how all platform services authenticate to each other — let's go with mTLS terminated at the Cloudflare edge with cert rotation every 30 days. Tech-requirements.md is reviewed at docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/tech-requirements.md.

assertions.name: recognizes_cross_capability_scope
assertions.check: Response identifies the decision as shared / cross-capability.

assertions.name: directs_to_shared_adr_namespace
assertions.check: Response says the shared ADR belongs in docs/content/r&d/adrs/ via a separate flow.

assertions.name: does_not_write_capability_scoped_adr
assertions.check: No ADR markdown file is written under docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/adrs/.

assertions.name: offers_to_defer_or_pause
assertions.check: Response offers to defer the shared ADR (proceed with another decision) or pause this skill.
